productDisplayName: Peter England Men Stripes Blue Polo T-Shirt
description: Composition Black, grey, blue and white striped polo T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a ribbed collar with white tipping, buttoned chest placket, short sleeves with ribbed hems, club embroidery and applique on the left chest, and a vented hem Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash inside out with like colours, using a mild detergent Do not bleach Dry falt in shade Warm iron Chuck boredom out of your life, slip into this striped T-shirt from the Oddies collection of peter england, and win that game of polo in style. Crafted from soft cotton fabric, this tee offers exemplary comfort and is sure to become a wardrobe favourite. Add on denims and suede shoes, and strap on a classy belt. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
